title: Shared JSON Schema fragments for the schemas mechanism
description: Canonical $defs library: kit-wide patterns that recur across companion schemas. Per the .pkit/schemas/ area conventions + COR-019. Companions cross-file $ref into this file (e.g., "refs.schema.json#/$defs/source") so the pattern lives in one place. Namespace-narrowed reference patterns (e.g., issue_type_ref) live in the namespace owner's own companion, not here — the owner is the source of truth for its own namespace.

reference_token.description: Generic cross-schema reference token per COR-019. Form: `[<namespace>:<id>]`. Both namespace and id are kebab-case starting with a lowercase letter.

source.description: Structured lineage block carried by a schema distilled from an upstream spec. Optional — schemas that are their own source of truth omit it.

commit.description: Full 40-character git SHA the schema was distilled from.

decisions.description: Upstream decision identifiers the schema distills.

captured_at.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) the distillation was performed.
